use_cases: Form submission triggers with customizable variants for primary, secondary, and destructive actions
Navigation CTAs with link variant styling
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements
Accessible interactive elements with focus-visible outlines and disabled states
ai_summary: A reusable Radix-based button component with CVA variants for styling. Supports multiple visual styles including default, outline, ghost, secondary, destructive, and link variants. Features shadow effects, hover transitions, and accessibility-compliant focus states. Designed as an atomic component for composing larger UI systems.
